Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Oct-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PATRICIA WALSH, Esq. of Patricia Walsh, A Professional Law Corporation (Tel: 650-832-3757) for plaintiff Pribuss Engineering, Inc.;
RYAN J. DEROSE, Esq. of Park & Lim (Tel: 213-386-5595) for defendant CalAsia Construction, Inc.;
Attys. ANTHONY J. BARRON, Esq. and Taylor B. Hooks, Esq. of Nixon Peabody LLP (Tel: 415-984-8200) for defendant Chotto Matte (San Francisco), LLC;
Atty. ROEY Z. RAHMIL, Esq. of Shartsis Friese LLP (Tel: 415-421-6500) for defendant PPF/Blatteis 120 Stockton Street Owner, LP.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHOTTO MATTE (SAN FRANCISCO), LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendant Chotto Matte (San Francisco), LLC's motion to compel arbitration and stay action. (302/RBU) *****

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Continued To Oct-03-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
RYAN J. DEROSE , Esq., PARK & LIM (213) 386-5595 ryan@parkandlim.com Attorneys for Defendant CalAsia Construction, Inc.

Not Contested. Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHOTTO MATTE (SAN FRANCISCO), LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Continued to October 3, 2024, to be heard with related case CGC-24-614056.
